title: NFL free agency grades: Sizing up 20-plus big signings and trades
content: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the John Franklin-Myers and Boye Mafe signings.

title: Sources: Tua to sign 1-year deal with Falcons
content: Former Miami Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa plans to sign a one-year deal with the Atlanta Falcons, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Big-spending Raiders add Linderbaum, Walker
content: Free agent center Tyler Linderbaum reached agreement Monday on a record deal with the Raiders, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Seahawks keep Shaheed in fold with $51M deal
content: The Seahawks are bringing back wide receiver Rashid Shaheed on a three-year, $51 million deal that includes $34.7 million guaranteed, agents Drew Rosenhaus and Robert Bailey told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: NBA halts Hawks' planned tribute to Magic City
content: The NBA has called off the Hawks' plans for celebrating Atlanta's famed strip club, saying it did so because of "concerns" from across the league.

title: Sources: Phils giving Luzardo 5-year extension
content: The Phillies locked in Jesus Luzardo a year before he was due to reach free agency by agreeing on an extension worth $135 million, sources said.

title: Skubal to stick with plan, not pitch again in WBC
content: After mulling changing his plans, Tigers ace Tarik Skubal decided to stick to his original plan and not pitch again in this year's World Baseball Classic.

title: Star WR Evans leaving Bucs to sign with 49ers
content: Star wide receiver Mike Evans is leaving the Buccaneers to sign a three-year deal with the 49ers, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Jones hints at UFC release after 'lowball' offer
content: Jon Jones asked the UFC to release him from his contract if the promotion believes "I'm done," a reaction to getting ''lowballed'' on the White House card offer.

title: 🔍 Why Miami released Tua; how he fits in ATL
content: If Michael Penix Jr. isn't ready for the season, the Falcons have a new lefty QB to start. Here are the key questions about the move.

title: Fans' guide to men's basketball this March: The 10 most important things to know
content: The five teams at the top. The players to watch. The narratives likely to shape the conference and NCAA tournaments.

title: Champ Week takeaways: Top seeds and NCAA hosts set, but should UConn or UCLA be No. 1 overall?
content: A week before Selection Sunday, which teams should be worried (Tennessee) or encouraged (Notre Dame)? And what's the state of the bubble?

title: Women's Bracketology: Championship Sunday brings clarity to No. 1 seeds, top 16
content: Texas locked up the No. 3 overall seed, Duke moved to a No. 2 and West Virginia should host tournament games.

title: NBA stars reflect on Wilt Chamberlain's 'mythical' legacy
content: As Gilgeous-Alexander closes in on breaking the longest 20-point scoring streak, NBA stars reflect on Chamberlin's legacy.

title: NHL Awards Watch: Celebrini challenges for MVP; dead heat for Norris
content: With about a month left in the season, here's how PHWA voters are feeling about all the major awards.

title: Mike Evans' fit in San Fran? 49ers bring leadership to WR room amid renovation
content: Evans has agreed to sign a three-year contract with the 49ers, leaving the Tampa Bay Buccaneers after 12 seasons.

title: Commanders land Oweh on 4-year, $100M deal
content: Former Chargers defensive end Odafe Oweh, who has 17.5 sacks since 2024, has agreed with the Commanders on a four-year, $100 million deal, his agents told ESPN.

title: Sources: QB Willis, Fins reach 3-year, $67.5M deal
content: Free agent QB Malik Willis, after reviving his career with the Packers, has agreed to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with the Dolphins, sources told ESPN.

title: Source: Saints spend $113M on Etienne, Edwards
content: The Saints have reached a four-year, $52M deal with ex-Jaguars RB Travis Etienne Jr. and a four-year, $61M deal with guard David Edwards, sources told ESPN.

title: Colts re-sign WR Pierce, trade Pittman to Steelers
content: The Indianapolis Colts are re-signing wide receiver Alec Pierce but are trading his running mate Michael Pittman Jr. out of town.

title: Source: Kelce returning to Chiefs on 1-year deal
content: Tight end Travis Kelce, a three-time champion with the Chiefs, has agreed to a one-year deal that is worth $12M and can max out at $15M, a source told ESPN.

title: Sources: Packers trading DL Gary to Cowboys
content: The Green Bay Packers are finalizing a deal that would send defensive lineman Rashan Gary to the Dallas Cowboys in exchange for a 2027 draft pick, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter. The pick is a fourth-rounder, according to NFL Network.

title: Did NIL kill the upset? Why power conferences just keep dominating in March
content: Where did all the Cinderella stories who busted our brackets go? Inside why the madness seems to be vanishing.

title: When will Cole return? Is Dominguez a trade candidate? What to expect from six make-or-break Yankees
content: Reinforcements? Trade bait? Some key players won't be on the field in the Bronx on Opening Day. Here's what that means.

title: How Jurickson Profar helped sign his replacement -- and next steps for the Braves
content: In the wake of Profar's suspension, Yastrzemski's signing has become even more important for Atlanta.

title: Despite wingback depth, Sergiño Dest injury threatens USMNT's World Cup hopes
content: Sergiño Dest insists his season isn't over after suffering a hamstring injury, but if it is, that's a headache the U.S. doesn't need for the World Cup.

title: Predicting the USWNT's World Cup starting lineup
content: With 2027 closer than you think, we forecast the 11 players Emma Hayes will count on for the tournament.

title: Milan's big derby win; Arsenal's FA Cup scare; Yamal stars again for Barcelona; more
content: Milan's derby win over Inter has opened a little bit of a title race again in Italy ... at least for now. Plus: Arsenal messed around in the FA Cup and nearly paid for it, while Lamine Yamal showed just how great he is for Barcelona.

title: Why Premier League giants can't afford to miss UCL riches
content: The price of failure increases as the importance of the Champions League never goes away for big clubs.

title: Soccer brawl in Brazil leads to 23 red cards
content: Cruzeiro's 1-0 win over Atlético-MG in Sunday's Mineiro Championship final was overshadowed by a mass brawl that erupted seconds before the final whistle and resulted in 23 red cards issued.

title: 2026 Players Championship: Ranking the top 25 players in the field
content: We run through the top contenders among the 123-man field to win the PGA Tour's flagship event at TPC Sawgrass.

title: The pride and power of Iowa State basketball's Audi Crooks
content: Audi Crooks hears the haters. But Iowa State's star inherited resilience from her mom and joy from her dad. Her high-scoring game is the ultimate counterpoint.

title: UFC 326 fight grades: The F in BMF stands for fail
content: The BMF title headliner between Charles Oliveira and Max Holloway earned the lowest grade at UFC 326.

title: Team Canada's Thurston delivers remarkable curling shot in Paralympics
content: Thurston's shot threaded the needle through two guard rocks before clearing two Norway stones out of the house.

title: Australian GP overreactions: Verstappen could quit F1? McLaren on the ropes?
content: After a wild, often polarising Australian Grand Prix weekend, ESPN looks at some of the sweeping generalisations being made about Formula 1 and judges whether they're overblown or not.

title: Postseason pointers: Five keys to winning in the playoffs
content: Now that the fantasy basketball playoffs have started, Eric Karabell lays out how to take home the championship.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Fulham eye USMNT striker Ricardo Pepi
content: Fulham are planning to accelerate their efforts to sign Fulham and USMNT striker Ricardo Pepi. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Commercial LPG cylinders remain unfilled  at bottling plants of OMC’s
content: Distributors of Indian Oil, Bharat Petroleum, and Hindustan Petroleum confirm that bottling of commercial cylinders had been stopped at the plants. Hotels, restaurants, small eateries, and tea stalls take the hit and initiate stringency measures

title: Rajasthan Assembly passes Bill to scrap two-child norm for panchayat elections
content: The Rajasthan Panchayati Raj (Amendment) Bill, 2026, was passed in the House after an acrimonious debate, in which the Opposition Congress MLAs questioned the need for reversing the decision taken three decades ago

title: Former AGP leader Jayanta Khaund joins Congress
content: Welcoming him into the party, Gaurav Gogoi said the induction of a grassroots leader like Jayanta Khaund reflected growing discontent in Assam against the leadership of Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma

title: Prime Minister to launch projects worth ₹10,800 crore at Kochi event
content: Modi to lay foundation stone for a polypropylene unit at Kochi Refinery; He will  also inaugurate 23 rural roads constructed under Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana in the State

title: Sharad Pawar, Ramdas Athawale among 26 elected unopposed to Rajya Sabha
content: In Telangana, Congress candidates Abhishek Singhvi and Vem Narender Reddy were elected unopposed. In Tamil Nadu, all six candidates were elected unopposed

title: Call for deferring SA-2 exam in view of Ugadi, Id holidays
content: Parents and teachers have urged the DSEL to postpone the exam which is now scheduled to be held from March 20

title: PM Modi speaks to Nepal leaders Rabi Lamichhane, Balendra Shah
content: The PM congratulated the Rastriya Swatantra Party leaders on their election victory and conveyed India's commitment to work with them for mutual prosperity, progress and well-being of the two countries

title: Tamil Nadu can never be painted in saffron, says CM Stalin
content: The BJP will never be able to rule the State even if it comes  wearing the mask of the AIADMK, the DMK president says at the 12th State conference of the party at Siruganur on the outskirts of Tiruchi

title: Madras HC directs GRH Dean to complete post-mortem in alleged ‘custodial’ death of youth in Sivaganga
content: During the course of the hearing, Additional Advocate General M. Ajmal Khan submitted that there was no custodial torture as alleged and that the youth was never taken to the Manamadurai police station

title: JPC on higher education Bill to interact with UGC, AICTE, NCTE officials this week
content: The Viksit Bharat Shiksha Adhishthan Bill was introduced to ‘overhaul the regulatory framework’ of higher education in India by replacing the UGC, AICTE, and NCTE with a single regulatory body

title: Mobilisation for a column on denotified tribes in Census forms picks up pace
content: Associations of denotified, nomadic, and semi-nomadic tribes in north India form a central action committee; community leaders demand meeting with Census officers

title: KSHEC hosts lecture on Cuba’s experience in science, innovation and international cooperation
content: Cuban diplomat reflects on the ties between Cuba and Kerala, emphasises the scope for deeper collaboration. He pushes for partnerships between universities and research institutions in Kerala and Cuba

title: If BNS distinguishes between throwing and administering acid, RPwD Act must too: Supreme Court
content: Chief Justice Kant said statutory provisions should be able to cover not only acts committed, but also be able to foresee offences which in all probability may occur in the future

title: Law and order lapses during Bengal polls will not be tolerated: CEC
content: Whenever we spoke about SIR, they said the matter is in the Supreme Court. If that is the case, why did they call a meeting?, Bengal Minister Chandrima Bhattacharya said

title: Mamata accuses CEC of threatening West Bengal officials during meeting
content: Trinamool Congress chairperson says to ensure free and fair elections, BJP must allow those on adjudication list to vote

title: West Asia dominates Lok Sabha; resolution on Speaker’s removal not taken up
content: Government unlikely to agree to discuss West Asia crisis after External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar made a suo motu statement on the issue in both Houses of Parliament

title: Manipur BJP unit protests against Central and State BJP for inaction in MLA’s death
content: ‘Despite the death of a sitting MLA belonging to the ruling party, there has been no visible accountability for those responsible for the assault,’ the Thanlon unit of the BJP says in a statement

title: Soldier goes missing during river crossing drill in Jammu
content: The Army said extensive search operations were underway with all available resources of the Indian Army and civil agencies being employed to locate the soldier

title: Government sends feelers to Opposition on women’s quota law implementation
content: The government is looking into bringing an amendment to the 106th Constitutional Amendment Act to remove the requirement of delimitation for reserving seats for women in Lok Sabha and State Assemblies

title: Professors promoted as Principals in government arts and science colleges
content: The appointments are based on directions issued by the Kerala Administrative Tribunal (KAT) in connection with disputes over Principal appointments in government colleges

title: Hotels may shut if LPG supply not resumed: Bengaluru Hotels Association
content: Meanwhile, State CM Siddaramaiah criticised the Centre over the recent increase in LPG cylinder prices, saying the hike was not justified

title: As summer sets in, residents raise concern over water shortage in Kochi
content: The situation is expected to worsen as temperatures continue to rise, raising concerns among residents about the availability of adequate drinking water in the coming weeks

title: Medical negligence: HC asks govt. to provide free medical assistance, education to child
content: Nine-year-old girl’s right hand had to be amputated after it was infected due to ‘negligence’ at the district hospital, Palakkad

title: Tension in U.P. locality after attack on religious leader
content: The Congress has alleged such incidents are part of a broader pattern to disturb harmony at a local level. ‘An organised pattern is at play across Western U.P. to disturb harmony through localised incidents aimed at terrorising minorities’

title: India will not raise petrol prices despite global crude headwinds: Government sources
content: The minimum gap for booking a domestic LPG refill has been increased to 25 days from the current 21 days, a move aimed at preventing hoarding and ensuring equitable distribution of cylinders

title: MPs demand stricter enforcement of laws to tackle air pollution
content: Members want “conceptual restructuring” of the Environment Ministry to meet emerging challenges of climate change; Swati Maliwal terms Delhi’s air pollution crisis an “ongoing crime”

title: Once released, climate activist Sonam Wangchuk will not protest: wife
content: He will carry forward the movement in Ladakh with dialogue and collaboration, says Gitanjali J. Angmo

title: Simultaneous polls can curb defections, says Ghulam Nabi Azad at JPC meet
content: Former J&K Chief Minister calls ONOE a “win‑win” model that strengthens democratic stability and cuts election fatigue

title: Construction of dog shelter at Brahmapuram inaugurated
content: The decision to build the shelter comes in the wake of the Supreme Court directive that stray dogs should be removed from public spaces and that local bodies must take the lead in the effort

title: Karnataka High Court declines to quash female foeticide case against government doctor and others
content: Female foeticide is not merely a statutory offence, it is a moral blight and a constitutional affront, says High Court

title: CPA invites EoIs to develop marine tourism at Puthuvype beach
content: The CPA expects proposals for projects such as beach resorts, eco-resorts, waterfront hospitality infrastructure, recreational facilities, water sports infrastructure, wellness tourism, cultural spaces, tourism-supporting amenities and other permissible coastal tourism activities

title: Protest staged after fire at garbage dumping yard chokes residents
content: Angry residents of Hosayellapur in Dharwad block road demanding immediate action to a recurring problem

title: K.N. Panikkar, a historian who defended India’s secular intellectual traditions
content: Panikkar was widely known not only as a Marxist historian, but also as a public intellectual who believed that history should challenge injustice and defend democratic and secular values

title: Boy accused in Ballari hostel rampage case taken into custody
content: The police secure him following a 36-hour search based on reliable information after incident leaves one student dead, seven injured

title: Anthropic India is distinct from U.S.-based firm, counsel tells court
content: Principal District Court allows Belagavi-based petitioner to amend his plaint, adjourns hearing till March 23

title: Trade unions, farm outfits to strengthen protests against U.S. trade deal, Labour Codes
content: They will hold mahapanchayats in all States to rally farmers and workers against the “pro-corporate” policies of the Union government

title: Power utilities told to gear up for summer demand surge
content: Energy Special Chief Secretary K. Vijayanand asks DISCOMs to ensure 24x7 quality supply as power demand in Andhra Pradesh may touch 280 MU per day in May

title: Wayanad township visit: CM expresses regret over Mammootty getting caught in row
content: Pinarayi says if any Communist Party of India (Marxist) activist was involved in the social media criticism that the actor was subjected to, he was sincerely apologetic for that

title: Acharya Sabha blames government for ghee adulteration in Tirupati laddus
content: Hindu Dharma Acharya Sabha urges greater vigilance in temple administration and says only Dharmic and responsible individuals should manage temple affairs to prevent violations of Shastra norms

title: Tamil Nadu can never be painted in saffron, says CM Stalin
content: The BJP will never be able to rule the State even if it comes  wearing the mask of the AIADMK, the DMK president says at the 12th State conference of the party at Siruganur on the outskirts of Tiruchi

title: Sreedharan seeks public support for Kerala high-speed rail plan
content: Former DMRC chairman’s plan has drawn attention as neither the State nor the Union government has expressed interest in taking it forward

title: Railway law enforcement agencies crack down on drug peddlers as pre-poll surveillance intensifies
content: Data on drug seizures by the Railway Protection Force and other agencies between January and the first week of March indicate that the Railways remain a key route for narcotic trafficking

title: KGMOA opposes extension of OP hours
content: Govt. increases OP hours by 1 hour from the present 8 a.m. to 1 p.m. Doctors say they are already working without adequate rest and extending OP hours is going to push them to severe physical and mental stress

title: Government working to ‘optimise’ gas supply as Gulf war hits LNG flow
content: India faces a nearly 40% hit to its LNG supply due to the West Asia conflict, prompting the government to devise an "optimisation plan" for industries. While fertiliser remains a priority, some supply reduction is possible, though the sector is currently buffered by high urea stocks and the agricultural lean season.

title: Salesforce CEO says layoffs at Jack Dorsey's Block do not signal Al-led jobs apocalypse
content: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff dismisses Block's massive layoffs as company-specific issues, not an AI-driven job apocalypse. He argues AI enhances productivity without wholesale cuts, citing Salesforce's growth.  Critics suggest Block's cuts are due to pandemic-era bloat, not solely AI, a narrative echoed by former employees and analysts.

title: Manchester-bound flight returns to Delhi after flying 13 hours; London-Mumbai diverted to Cairo
content: A flight to Manchester experienced a significant delay and returned to Delhi after over 13 hours due to a call sign mix-up. The leased aircraft, operating under IndiGo's code, faced air traffic control confusion in Eritrea. This incident highlights the complexities of rerouting flights around West Asian airspace due to ongoing conflicts, impacting flight durations and operational viability.

title: From Shahed drones to B-2 bombers: 10 weapons shaping the US-Iran war
content: A technologically complex missile and drone battle is unfolding, pitting Iran's swarms of cheap Shahed drones and ballistic missiles against US and Israeli advanced defence systems. This conflict highlights an economic war of attrition, where low-cost Iranian weapons force the expenditure of millions on interceptors. The sustainability of this high-cost defence is now a critical question.

title: PM Modi speaks with Nepal's newly elected youth leader Balendra Shah, Rabi Lamichhane
content: Nepal’s political landscape witnessed a dramatic transformation, as newly elected youth leader Balendra “Balen” Shah unseated veteran politician and former Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli from his parliamentary stronghold. A structural engineer by profession who first rose to prominence as the mayor of Kathmandu, Shah has now made history four years later by becoming the youngest person ever to claim Nepal’s Prime Ministership.

title: Amazon sends complaint letter to FCC against Elon Musk's Starlink
content: Amazon's Leo has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's ambitious one million-satellite proposal, citing a lack of critical orbital and RF data. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, lacks space safety details, and would take centuries to deploy, potentially monopolizing orbital resources. The filing questions the feasibility and intent behind SpaceX's massive constellation.

title: Opposition likely to move notice for CEC removal
content: The joint opposition is preparing to move a notice for the removal of Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar in Rajya Sabha soon after the Lok Sabha addresses the notice against Speaker Om Birla. This move, spearheaded by TMC, stems from concerns over electoral roll reviews in West Bengal, with other INDIA bloc parties now reportedly on board.

title: Sundar Pichai congratulates Team India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup
content: India achieved a historic T20 World Cup victory, becoming the first nation to defend its title and win on home soil. Their dominant performance against New Zealand, highlighted by exceptional batting and bowling, secured their third T20 World Cup title. Tech leaders Sundar Pichai and Satya Nadella congratulated the team on their remarkable achievement.

title: Brandon Hagel faces suspension talk after hit on Rasmus Dahlin in NHL clash
content: One of the most tense moments in the NHL game of Lightning vs Sabres in Tampa Bay has been a headline after Brandon Hagel hit Rasmus Dahlin in the second period. The act was preceded by a physical contact between two players, and a penalty was given. The play is already attracting debate on whether the National Hockey League might need to replay the hit to have it suspended.

title: NFL trade rumors: Atlanta Falcons linked to $124M QB Tua Tagovailoa
content: Miami Dolphins are releasing quarterback Tua Tagovailoa, incurring a record $99 million in dead cap money. This move positions Tagovailoa as a potential target for the Atlanta Falcons, who are expected to part ways with Kirk Cousins. He could serve as a bridge quarterback for Michael Penix Jr. as he recovers from injury.

title: NFL trade rumors: Steelers projected to land $70M New York Giants WR
content: Analysts predict Pittsburgh Steelers could benefit from New York Giants receiver Wan’Dale Robinson. Robinson’s agility and ability to excel in short passes align with potential quarterback Aaron Rodgers’ preferred passing style for his first year as a Steeler. With three Steelers receivers hitting free agency and one retiring, only two remain. And new head coach Mike McCarthy may want to add new receivers to the realm. So, Robinson could make perfect sense with DK Metcalf and Roman Wilson.

title: Do we have nothing except Bengal SIR to hear, asks SC
content: The Supreme Court expressed frustration over frequent West Bengal-related petitions, questioning its workload. Petitioners challenging voter list deletions highlighted a lack of appeal options. The court agreed to hear these alongside ongoing voter roll scrutiny issues, emphasizing that bureaucrats shouldn't overrule judicial officers' decisions.

title: Fuel shortage fear grips Pakistan: Sharif orders school shutdown, four-day workweek
content: Pakistan has implemented austerity measures to conserve fuel amid Middle East conflict concerns. These include a two-week school closure, reduced government fuel allowances by 50%, and a four-day workweek for public offices, with 50% of staff working remotely. These steps aim to manage potential supply disruptions and reduce domestic demand for imported fuel.

title: Ram Gopal Varma reviews 'Dhurandhar 2' trailer, calls it 'stratosphere level'
content: Filmmaker Ram Gopal Varma has reacted to the trailer of 'Dhurandhar 2'. He described the film's scale and intensity as 'stratospheric level'. Varma previously lauded the first 'Dhurandhar' as a 'quantum leap' for Indian cinema. The sequel is set to release on March 19. The trailer has generated significant online buzz and anticipation for the espionage thriller.

title: 'I was facing a lot of difficulties personally': Hardik Pandya opens up on tough phase
content: Hardik Pandya celebrated India's back-to-back T20 World Cup victories, fulfilling a personal promise to win trophies for his country. After a redemption-focused 2024 win amidst personal struggles, Pandya's commitment to winning every tournament was validated by the 2026 title triumph in Ahmedabad, marking a significant achievement for the team.

title: From apology to choosing Mojtaba Khamenei: The growing rift between Iranian leadership
content: Iran's leadership faces internal divisions following the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. President Pezeshkian's apology to neighbours sparked backlash from hardliners. The appointment of Mojtaba Khamenei as the new supreme leader also revealed rifts. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' influence is growing, highlighting power struggles within Tehran's establishment during the ongoing conflict.

title: Battle of the rolls: How Mamata vs EC over SIR has set stage for 2026 Bengal assembly elections
content: West Bengal’s Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls has evolved from a technical checkinto a major political and constitutional confrontation ahead of the 2026 polls. With 63.7 lakh deletions and the electorate shrinking to 6.44 crore, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee challenged the process in the Supreme Court, turning voter verification into a wider political battle with the Election Commission.

title: Craving sugar constantly? Endocrinologist explains causes and control tips
content: Sugar cravings can be a window into your body's underlying issues rather than merely a sign of indulgence. When your blood sugar levels fluctuate or hormones like insulin and cortisol are in disarray, those sweet cravings can intensify. Additionally, if you're missing out on essentials like protein, fiber, or healthy fats, you're more likely to reach for sugary treats.

title: Midnight missiles: Japan quietly deploys 1,000 km Type-12 launchers, China now within reach
content: Japan is deploying its first long-range missiles. Launchers have arrived at a camp in Kumamoto Prefecture. These missiles will be operational by the end of March. This move comes amid rising tensions around Taiwan. Japan is accelerating its military buildup in the southwestern region. The missiles have a significantly extended range. Further deployments are planned for later this year.

title: A new Khamenei as Supreme Leader, oil above $100: Did Trump miscalculate Iran?
content: Operation Epic Fury escalates as Iran installs Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader following his father's death. With oil prices soaring above $100 a barrel and attacks widening across the region, the conflict is morphing into a larger, riskier war with no clear end in sight.

title: Rs 70k crore tax evasion probe: Madurai to Shimla — raids at over 70 restaurants over ‘vanishing bill’
content: The Income Tax investigation wing has launched a pan-India survey of approximately 70 restaurants suspected of sales suppression totaling Rs 700 crore. This action follows a Rs 70,000 crore probe into billing software manipulation used to evade taxes. Investigations revealed methods like deleting cash transactions and under-declaring revenue.

title: Two Akanksha Singhs, one UPSC rank: Ghazipur candidate confirmed at 301
content: The UPSC clarified that Akanksha Singh from Ghazipur, Uttar Pradesh, secured rank 301 in the Civil Services Examination 2025, resolving confusion over two candidates with the same name claiming the same rank. The commission confirmed the successful candidate's details, including roll number and parentage, amidst reports of another Akanksha Singh from Bihar also claiming the rank.

title: 'You were in bad form, I was out for two years': Ishan Kishan's witty reply to Abhishek Sharma
content: India's T20 World Cup 2026 heroes Ishan Kishan and Abhishek Sharma shared their journeys of overcoming criticism and self-doubt. Kishan highlighted the importance of self-belief and hard work after a two-year absence, while Sharma credited the unwavering support of teammates and management for his crucial final performance. Both emphasized the power of positive company and continuous improvement.

title: Samson, Bumrah lead four Indians in ICC T20 World Cup Team of the Tournament
content: India secured a record third ICC Men's T20 World Cup title in 2026, with four players making the official Team of the Tournament. Player of the Tournament Sanju Samson led the charge with 321 runs, including a final-record 89. Ishan Kishan, Hardik Pandya, and Jasprit Bumrah also earned spots for their stellar performances.

title: Indonesia to procure BrahMos missiles from India: Report
content: In 2023, BrahMos Aerospace, a company jointly owned by the governments of India and Russia, told Reuters it was in advanced discussions with Jakarta on a potential agreement estimated to be worth between $200 million and $350 million. Rico said the agreement was "part of the modernisation of military hardware and defence capabilities, especially in the maritime sector."

title: 'Not punishment': Pakistan coach breaks silence on Babar Azam exclusion
content: Pakistan's white-ball coach Mike Hesson clarified that senior players' absence from the Bangladesh ODI series isn't punishment for the T20 World Cup exit. He emphasized it's an opportunity to test emerging talent, citing players like Sahabzada Farhan and Shamyl Hussain.  However, former pacer Sikander Bakht alleged Hesson overruled selectors during World Cup squad finalization, creating internal friction.

title: R Parthiban apologises to Trisha; Chidambaram gets bail, Jana Nayagan delay
content: Filmmaker R. Parthiban apologized to Trisha Krishnan following a controversial remark. Meanwhile, Malayalam director Chidambaram received anticipatory bail in a harassment case. The censor review for Vijay's 'Jana Nayagan' was postponed again. Rumors about 'Vaadivaasal' revival were denied, and Mahesh Babu concluded the Georgia schedule for 'Varanasi'.

title: 'Can’t assist once you exit': Indians told not to leave Iran without embassy nod
content: The Indian Embassy in Tehran has advised Indian nationals in Iran against approaching land border points for exit without prior coordination. The mission emphasized it cannot assist individuals stranded after leaving Iranian territory without entering a third country. This advisory follows the External Affairs Minister's statement on India's focus on dialogue and diplomacy to de-escalate Middle East tensions.

title: How this 65-Year-old woman from Patna built Rs 2.5 crore food empire in 5 years
content: Facing initial disapproval, Devni Devi started a tiffin service from her kitchen at 59 to support her family. Despite societal judgment and personal sacrifices, her dedication to providing nutritious home-cooked meals for students led to growing popularity. Her small venture has now blossomed into a successful restaurant with a significant turnover and a loyal customer base.

title: "Nowhere Near": Trump Says US Not Planning To Send Troops To Iran
content: US President Donald Trump on Monday told the New York Post in a telephonic interview that the United States is not planning to send troops into Iran to secure enriched uranium from the nuclear sites.

title: Trump Calls Iran War "Very Complete", Threatens To Take Over Hormuz Strait
content: President Donald Trump said Monday in an interview with CBS that the war with Iran was "very complete" and that the United States was far ahead of his initial timeline of around a month.

title: Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Putin, Trump Discuss Iran War Over Call, Says Kremlin
content: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Saudi Arabia sharpened its warnings to Iran early Monday, telling Tehran it would be the "biggest loser" if it continues to attack Arab states.

title: Putin, Trump Hold Phone Call, Discuss Iran And Ukraine Wars
content: Russia's President Vladimir Putin and US President Donald Trump on Monday discussed the Iran war and Ukraine conflict during a "frank and constructive" telephone call, the Kremlin said.

title: 2 Charged With Terrorism After Bomb Attack On Anti-Islam Protest In New York
content: Two men accused of igniting homemade bombs at a chaotic anti-Islam protest outside the New York City mayor's mansion told police they were inspired by Islamic State and were charged on Monday with federal terrorism-related crimes.

title: Putin Says Russia Will Supply Energy To Europe If It Asks
content: Russia would supply oil and gas to European buyers, provided such co-operation was "long-term" and did not put political pressure on Moscow, President Vladimir Putin said Monday.

title: Cheetah Count Hits 53 After Jwala Gives Birth To 5 Cubs In Madhya Pradesh's Kuno
content: In a major boost to India's ambitious Project Cheetah, Namibian female cheetah Jwala has given birth to five healthy cubs at Kuno National Park in Madhya Pradesh's Sheopur district.

title: Balen Shah's RSP Sweeps Nepal Polls, Winning 125 Of 165 Seats
content: The Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) secured nearly 76 per cent of the seats in the House of Representatives in a sweeping electoral victory.

title: After Khamenei's Death, Iran Sent A Signal To Activate Sleeper Cells: Report
content: American intelligence agencies have intercepted encrypted communications believed to have originated in Iran, raising concerns that the signal could serve as a possible trigger for sleeper operatives outside the country.

title: Fuel Prices Up, Salaries Cut: Energy Shock To Pakistan Amid Iran War
content: Pakistan's PM Shehbaz Sharif on Monday announced a sweeping austerity and energy-saving plan, saying the steps were necessary as the country confronts a global fuel crisis triggered by the ongoing conflict involving the US, Israel and Iran.

title: Top Kuki Students' Body Questions Manipur Congress MP's Comments On Land, ST
content: A key organisation of students from the Kuki tribes has asked Manipur Congress MP Angomcha Bimol Akoijam to clarify on comments he reportedly made on issues linked to administration of Manipur's hills and valley.

title: Row In Madhya Pradesh As Congress Seeks Separate Religion Code For Tribals
content: A political controversy has erupted in Madhya Pradesh after Leader of the Opposition Umang Singhar demanded that tribals be given a separate religion code.

title: Raghav Chadha Urges Expansion of 'Udaan Yatri Cafes' Across All Airports
content: Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha on Monday raised the issue of affordable food at airports and urged the government to expand the Udaan Yatri Cafe initiative across all airports in the country.

title: "He's On It": Trump's Update Over Iranian Women Footballers In Australia
content: US President Donald Trump has warned Australia that it is making a "terrible humanitarian mistake" by allowing Iran's women's national football team to be sent back to Iran.

title: Anthropic Sues Pentagon Over 'Supply-Chain Risk' Designation
content: Anthropic filed suit Monday against the Trump administration, alleging it retaliated over the AI company's refusal to let its Claude AI model be used for autonomous lethal warfare and mass surveillance of Americans.

title: Kashmiri Leaders Meet Iranian Ambassador, Express Support For Iran
content: The recent groundswell of protests in Kashmir over the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, appears to have prompted Kashmiri leaders to rush to the Iranian Embassy in New Delhi to express solidarity and offer their condolences.

title: 'Will Stay Open Till Last Drop': Bengaluru Hotels' SOS Over Commercial Gas
content: An association of hotels in Bengaluru has sounded an SOS over concerns operations could be affected after the supply of commercial gas cylinders stopped.

title: New Rule On LPG Refill Booking To Curb Hoarding Amid Iran War
content: To prevent hoarding and black marketing, the booking period for LPG gas cylinders has been increased from 21 to 25 days, as per government sources.

title: "India-Nepal Ties Will Scale New Heights": PM Modi Congratulates Balen Shah
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Monday congratulated RSP leadersRabi Lamichhane and Balendra Shah for their forthcoming new government in Nepal.

title: Mojtaba Khamenei Takes Over, But Iran's Power Is No Longer In One Man's Hands
content: For decades, Iran's Supreme Leader had almost total control. But now that Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been killed, the person replacing him, his son, Mojtaba Khamenei, likely won't have that same 'untouchable' status.

title: Is the Super Bowl MVP an RB1 in Fantasy? Kenneth Walker III moves to Kansas City
content: the Kansas City Chiefs plan to sign super bowl LX MVP Kenneth Walker III during free agency . he is coming off the second 1,000-yard rushing season of his four-year career . the Chiefs have long been viewed as a top-10 fantasy option at the position .

title: 'Like they robbed a bank in broad daylight': CFB's unique tampering etiquette
content: coach Dabo Swinney calls out Ole Miss for "blatant" tampering . he says school tried to lure a Clemson player into the transfer portal . coach says he bailed for more money at Ole miss .

title: Week 4: Top 25 rankings, play of the week and what to watch
content: Chris Walsh stuns LSU with a three-run homer as Northeastern adds on to its lead . last week, the former no. 2 team in the country lost a home game to northeastern 13-10, then on the road at UL-Lafayette, suffered another loss .

title: Dolphins signing Malik Willis to replace Tua Tagovailoa: Answering 6 key questions
content: the Miami Dolphins agree to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with quarterback malik Willis . the deal presumably makes him the team's starting quarterback for at least the 2026 season . first-year general manager Jon-Eric Sullivan played coy with his interest in him at the NFL combine .

title: Panthers land Phillips on 4-year deal, sources say
content: former Dolphins linebacker jaelan Phillips agrees to a four-year, $120 million deal with the Carolina Panthers . the deal includes $80 million in guarantees, according to ESPN NFL Insider Adam Schefter . Phillips called landing in Philadelphia "literally the greatest thing that has happened to me"

title: What does White House fight card say about the state of the UFC?
content: a six-fight slate for Freedom Fights 250 is set for June 14 in washington, d.c., on the white house South Lawn . defending champion Ilia Topuria and interim champion Justin Gaethje will meet for the right to be called "undisputed"

title: Why did the Chiefs sign Kenneth Walker III, and what's next for Kansas City?

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts and rumors
content:
Dan Orlovsky and Peter Schrager weigh in on why the Raiders signing C Tyler Linderbaum is good for Fernando Mendoza. (0:50) NFL free agency  officially begins at 4 p.m. ET on Wednesday, with the start of the new league year. But as of Monday at noon ET, when the legal negotiation window opened, teams can now agree to terms with players. Quarterback  Malik Willis  is signing with the Dolphins and  Tua Tagovailoa  is signing with the Falcons, but which team could be interested in  Kyler Murray ? What's the latest on edge rusher  Trey Hendrickson ? And which big-name players are available as trade candidates? We're tracking all the action of 2026 NFL free agency. title: 97% of employers say English proficiency key now: Report
content: Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. Through his 2,500 articles and related outlets, he has emerged as a trusted voice in national discourse, particularly in linking education reform to broader societal change. Read More

title: Our national interest, including energy security & trade flows, will always be paramount: EAM
content: external affairs minister says new Delhi's approach will be guided by "national interest" "our national interest, including energy security and trade flows, will always be paramount," he says . he also points to india's pitch for de-escalation and return to dialogue .

title: Can acid-attack survivors be given government jobs? SC to states
content: the SC asked the states and UTs to explain if they can be rehabilitated by preferential employment in govts and PSUs . a bench of CJI Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi in its order said that if logistic problems were encountered, they should pay a honorarium or subsistence allowance to the needy among them . the bench noted that the state/UTs are providing one last opportunity to submit their views .

title: Despite ‘Make-in-India’ focus, India remains 2nd largest arms buyer in world: SIPRI report
content: india remains the world’s second-largest importer of major arms, accounting for 8.2% of the global share between 2021 and 2025, according to a new report by the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (SIPRI) the report also highlights a sharp decline in New Delhi’s decades-long dependence on Russia for arms supply .

title: Middle East tensions: Bahrain mission arranges for Indians' return from Saudi
content: the embassy in Riyadh is obtaining individual transit visa approvals from Saudi govt . stranded Indian nationals must fulfil certain pre-conditions, such as having a confirmed flight ticket for onward travel to India . Qatar has started seeing a handful of flights, including to India by Qatar Airways .

title: Stressful, toxic people in your life may make you age faster, say researchers

She specializes in health and heritage reporting, expertly simplifying complex health information to make it engaging and understandable for readers. Her deep dives into heritage topics are well-researched, resulting in captivating narratives that resonate with her audience.
